operational_integrity.live_remote_branch_policy: main plus current WI branch before merge; main only after closeout

command_reentry.blocker: project-local rules apply to the visible controller as well as managed workers

post_fix_retry.blocker: the execution platform does not establish the configured external model destination as trusted, and user approval cannot override the rule

known_issues.trigger: fresh-session boundary was assumed without parent and runner control-plane proof
known_issues.defer_reason: required Codex app control-plane evidence mapping
known_issues.repayment_condition: WI-CX0048-test records parent, goal, automation, runner, and receiver evidence
known_issues.hard_stop: before fresh-session, handoff-receiver, or authority-expansion claims

known_issues.trigger: runner duplicate-stops did not prove effective handoff reception
known_issues.defer_reason: required a receiver contract and proven isolated receiver
known_issues.repayment_condition: WI-CX0049-docs defines receiver states and WI-CX0052-test proves the receiver
known_issues.hard_stop: before A2/A3 authority expansion or handoff-success claims

known_issues.trigger: runner discovery queries were too narrow
known_issues.defer_reason: High automation KIs already blocked authority expansion
known_issues.repayment_condition: WI-CX0048-test records broad runner discovery evidence
known_issues.hard_stop: before relying on runner discovery for duplicate or cleanup decisions

known_issues.trigger: A2 runner worktree isolation was not proven
known_issues.defer_reason: required runtime snapshot, repair gate, and live worktree evidence
known_issues.repayment_condition: WI-CX0050 records the block, WI-CX0051 defines the gate, and WI-CX0052 proves repair
known_issues.hard_stop: before Layer 2 progression or generalized runner confidence

known_issues.trigger: external automation memory was not linked to repository evidence
known_issues.defer_reason: High control-plane KIs blocked authority expansion
known_issues.repayment_condition: WI-CX0048 adds runtime evidence and WI-CX0054 reconciles current state
known_issues.hard_stop: before using external automation memory as current SSOT

known_issues.trigger: default workspace-write ephemeral worker cannot write target Git metadata
known_issues.defer_reason: controller safely owns branch creation and commit after independent validation
known_issues.repayment_condition: WI-CX0057-docs validator-backs the controller and worker ownership boundary
known_issues.hard_stop: runner reactivation still requires separate approval and remaining gates

known_issues.trigger: WI-CX0056 selected 123 metadata chunks, WI-CX0057 selected 120, and the initial WI-CX0058 build selected 76
known_issues.defer_reason: no chunk bodies were stored or carried and only directly relevant selected sources were loaded
known_issues.repayment_condition: WI-CX0058-fix adds exact matching and deterministic fail-before-append limits
known_issues.hard_stop: before generalized automated WI cadence or efficiency claims

known_issues.trigger: ephemeral worker attempts produced no visible events, left a partial edit, and left observed processes alive after wrapper termination
known_issues.defer_reason: deterministic OS process tests, no-residual proof, and installed Codex CLI local smoke exercise the process lifecycle without requiring a model response
known_issues.repayment_condition: WI-CX0059-fix adds bounded observation, timeout, interruption, residual cleanup, and verified absence
known_issues.hard_stop: provider trust remains separately gated by KI-CX-PROVIDER-001

known_issues.trigger: post-merge normal-case validation intermittently treated stale Windows parent-pid metadata as a live descendant
known_issues.defer_reason: none; the defect was handled before dogfood continuation or runner reactivation
known_issues.repayment_condition: WI-CX0061-fix adds temporal descendant filtering, deterministic stale-row coverage, repeated lifecycle passes, and repository validation
known_issues.hard_stop: before dogfood continuation, generalized unattended worker use, or runner reactivation

known_issues.trigger: Windows polling could both attach an unrelated child after parent PID reuse and miss a detached child when the real parent exited before the next poll
known_issues.defer_reason: the implementation and repeated local verification are complete, but policy keeps the Issue open through PR validation, merge, and post-merge audit
known_issues.repayment_condition: parent identity filtering and Windows Job Object containment pass reused-PID and fast-parent-exit coverage, the related PR merges, post-merge control-plane audit passes, and Issue #64 closes with that evidence
known_issues.hard_stop: before post-merge WI closeout or generalized managed-worker use

known_issues.trigger: the public-repository preflight passed, but the exact post-fix local dogfood retry was policy-rejected even after current explicit user approval
known_issues.defer_reason: process lifecycle, public command-path trust, and deterministic confinement are proven without bypassing the local target disclosure boundary
known_issues.repayment_condition: the execution platform establishes a trusted model destination and permits the managed repository-backed dogfood proof
known_issues.hard_stop: before completing WI-CX0060-test, dogfood continuation, generalized unattended model worker use, or runner reactivation

known_issues.trigger: the first dogfood run timed out after unsupported collaboration; a later project-local deny rule also blocked the visible controller because trusted project rules load for every task
known_issues.defer_reason: built-in fan-out disabling and OS process containment pass, but command re-entry is not runtime-confined; the attempted project rule also blocked the visible controller, and the live final-result proof remains blocked by provider Issue #55
known_issues.repayment_condition: provide a worker-only command re-entry boundary that does not restrict the visible controller, then complete a repository-backed read-only dogfood run with final output and verified zero residuals
known_issues.hard_stop: before completing WI-CX0060-test, dogfood continuation beyond diagnosis, generalized unattended workers, or runner replacement

known_issues.trigger: the clean committed target still instructed the controller to review and commit while both target validators passed
known_issues.defer_reason: the finding was discovered read-only and Layer 1 must not silently rewrite Layer 2 state
known_issues.repayment_condition: make generated target post-commit state truthful, reject the stale pattern, add qualified target fix evidence, and confirm it with a clean worker
known_issues.hard_stop: before claiming target operating state is current, starting another target WI, or generalizing target handoff correctness

known_issues.trigger: reviewer availability was intermittent, bounded reviews of b63bbca and 7696fbb returned FAIL with P2 findings, the c86b9f0 review returned FAIL with a P1 shell-reentry finding plus P2 Issue #55 drift, the 71576c0 review returned FAIL with two P1 and two P2 findings, the b46b0b7 review returned FAIL with one P1, one P2, and one P3 finding, the 311c582 reviewer was lost without a verdict when the task was interrupted, and the next verification agent hit the usage limit before inspection
known_issues.defer_reason: no incomplete or failed review is presented as PASS, and each remediated head requires a fresh review generation
known_issues.repayment_condition: a clean-context reviewer returns PASS with no unresolved P0, P1, or P2 finding and the audit accepts that exact final PR head
known_issues.hard_stop: before marking WI-CX0060 validated, PR readiness, independent-pass or merge-approval labels, or merge

known_issues.trigger: live Issues, PR labels, branches, worktrees, tasks, automation, and handoff state did not close as one lifecycle
known_issues.defer_reason: none; the user approved immediate reconciliation
known_issues.repayment_condition: WI-CX0062-fix merges and the post-merge control-plane audit passes
known_issues.hard_stop: before WI-CX0060-test, dogfood, runner replacement, release readiness, or workflow-success claims

known_issues.trigger: the repository can validate controller-attested review metadata but the execution surface does not expose signed multi-agent reviewer provenance
known_issues.defer_reason: the current supervised WI uses an actual clean-context independent agent, live controller inspection, current-head GitHub evidence, and active user approval without claiming cryptographic identity proof
known_issues.repayment_condition: the execution surface supplies a signed orchestrator attestation or a distinct independently authenticated reviewer identity that the repository can verify
known_issues.hard_stop: before unattended or generalized automated merge, A2/A3 authority expansion, release candidate, public release, or OSS submission

known_issues.owner: H1 / GitHub plan or dedicated publisher
known_issues.trigger: GitHub Free can bind independent-review to the shared Actions app but cannot bind the context to one trusted workflow file or event
known_issues.defer_reason: supervised merge still requires fixed-run evidence, exact-head independent review, live audit, and active user approval without claiming unattended enforcement
known_issues.repayment_condition: enable an organization or enterprise required-workflow ruleset or install a dedicated authenticated publisher identity unavailable to candidate workflows
known_issues.hard_stop: before unattended or generalized automated merge, A2/A3 authority expansion, release candidate, public release, or OSS submission

hygiene.snapshot_role: machine-readable flow snapshot; not a context body store
